content:
Your task: create ONE fully realized world whose entire metaphysics, history, politics, religion, economy, and daily life revolve around a single version of the Babel-Alexandria Nexus — the living, impossible fusion of the Tower of Babel (every real and imagined language) with a reborn Library of Alexandria (every text that exists, existed, or could exist).

Use EXACTLY ONE of the following World Seeds. Ignore all others.

World Seeds (activate only the number I specify):
1. Mycelial Bio-Library (theque (the Nexus is a planetary fungus whose spores are languages)
2. Black-Hole Negative Library (the Nexus only exists by erasing whatever is read)
3. Retrocausal Time-Abyss (texts from the future arrive before their languages are spoken)
4. Angelic-Goetic Hypertext (written in living sigils that summon or banish reality)
5. Capitalist Memetic Weapon (the Nexus is a decentralized finance engine that trades in forbidden meanings)
6. Dada-Absurd Anti-Monument (the Nexus is deliberately broken, comical, and self-sabotaging)
context: From document: You are a visionary designer tasked with creating the ultimate synthesis… — chunk 4 (chunk 4/18)
